description: Rust program importing hyper v0.14.10 but only using the HTTP/1.1 client, never calling the vulnerable http2_only() or serve_connection() functions. CVE-2023-26964 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Only Client::new() and client.get() are called. The vulnerable http2_only() and serve_connection() functions are never invoked anywhere in source.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable functions http2_only() and serve_connection() are never called. Only the HTTP/1.1 client API is used, which does not trigger the HTTP/2 DoS vulnerability.
